modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Locked out of Duo due to missing push notifications.

full_description_text: User unable to access Duo. They did not receive push notifications. This resulted in being locked out of the system. Immediate assistance required to regain access.
short_description: Locked out of Duo due to missing push notifications.
description: User unable to access Duo. They did not receive push notifications. This resulted in being locked out of the system. Immediate assistance required to regain access.
